issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases.

scenarios.name: Team Zettelkasten vault with daily notes and Git sync
scenarios.rationale: Treatment builds the 0-inbox through 7-archive folder layout, writes a Templater daily template using tp.date.now and a project template with status/deadline frontmatter, supplies Dataview TABLE/LIST queries for the active-projects dashboard and orphan note finder, ignores workspace.json plus plugins/*/data.json, and installs the documented `*/30 * * * *` cron auto-commit; baseline produces generic folders and an ad-hoc daily template with no Dataview queries or Templater syntax.

scenarios.name: Plugin for related notes by shared tags
scenarios.rationale: Treatment scaffolds from obsidian-sample-plugin, implements onload registering a command via addCommand, reads tags from metadataCache against the active file, scores all markdown files by overlapping tags, takes top 5, and surfaces them through a Notice — matching the API surface (Plugin, addCommand, metadataCache, Notice) documented; baseline writes plausible TypeScript but uses invented APIs and never references metadataCache or Notice.
